Today on OnChain Revolution we are dropping a full tutorial on migrating tokens with @MigrateFun. No more being stuck in dead pools. With MigrateFun you can jump from pool to pool in seconds, powered by $HUSTLE token from @AgentHustleAI.

In this tutorial, we walk you step by step through how to migrate on the platform so you can complete your first move with confidence. The process is fast, simple, and built for creators who want to take back control of their liquidity.

Migration has never been this easy. Let us get started.
Once the migration is complete, the Migratefun team will provide an administrative checklist to ensure your new token is listed in all of the proper locations. https://t.co/djpd3UflfI

The migratefun team has talked with 300+ projects since the platform launch about a migration.

It’s critical to be highly communicative and transparent at this stage. Clear, frequent updates are key to maximizing migration participation. https://t.co/H0SmybbXOe
Continuous awareness building, information sharing, and educational teaching is required to undergo a succesful migration. https://t.co/ugHygwEoMy
Migrations with the highest participation are from those teams who effectively market the migration to their community privately and publicly. https://t.co/GVuKOs0WOz
Our FAQs can be found on our website at https://t.co/UY8HTs2DD5 and inside of our documentation. https://t.co/FAAP758rcv

Once the migration is complete all of the old tokens that are locked in the migration vault are sold into the existing LP to recover SOL. 

That SOL is then paired with the new token to seed the new LP in the desired migrating ecosystem. https://t.co/7daNiCP9ho

Upon completion of the migration, MFT holders will return to https://t.co/3aRn6exgXN to receive their new tokens once the claim portal is opened by the migrating team. 

The platform also takes a snapshot of holders who missed the migration so that they can also claim new tokens in the 90-day late claims window.

Our platform unlocks the capabilities to migrate LOCKED liquidity from one location to another. 

Once a team sets up their migration through @MigrateFun, users will come to the platform and lock their old tokens inside of the migration portal and receive a MFT (MigrateFun Token) placeholder until the migration is complete.

Migrations are not a new phenomenon to crypto. In fact, they are nearly as old as crypto itself! 

Although migrations are over a decade old practice, the implementations and methodologies have progressed alongside the industry. https://t.co/TGMfpa7f3q

Welcome to @MigrateFun, a brand new migration experience. 

Since July, our platform has migrated 40+ projects and $10M+ in liquidity across Solana AMMs and launchpads.

Good Day Akashians.

The time for migration approaches, here are the details and relevant information:

1. The Migration process back into the new @Pumpfun contract has many advantages, including but not limited to @Akasha_Rising being able to stream experiments, demos and capabilities. 

2. Creator rewards will fuel company speed and community contests, holder benefits, activities etc. 

3. Open Path AI is going to be our direction this next year, as Akasha and her agents progress into stronger forms, having the ability to stream and show advancements will make a great difference as opposed to building in the background. 

4. The Migration process starts tomorrow through @MigrateFun, be sure to only connect to the site published by them and us to avoid getting scammed. 

5. The migration will be 1:1, whatever holdings you have on AKA you will get of the new contract. 

6. We will migrate as much liquidity as possible, which is dependent on how many people participate on the migration, the more the better. 

7. The migration window of 1:1 will extend until January 5th, right before the new contract is launched. 

8. "Extended migration" will extend for 90 days after January 5th, with a PENALTY OF 50%, the ratio will not be 1:1 if you try to claim your tokens after the launch. 

What to do:

We will publish the link tomorrow as to where you need to connect your wallet and DEPOSIT your tokens for migration, once the new launch happens, the same wallet will be able to claim the new tokens.

The plans, partners and surprises for end of the year and 2026 will be getting published accordingly. 

We know exactly in which market conditions we currently are, and are not intimidated by them. 

Trends and metas come and go, but a solid team of builders and a solid community are the foundation for the strongest and most explosive comebacks in the market. 

Our tech, vision and strategies stand unbothered, and to those that have stood with us throughs tops and bottoms, we see you, and so does she!

$PNP migration to @PumpFun is coming soon  

The migration window opens December 9th, 2025 and stays open until December 16th.  

If you're holding the current token, you'll need to deposit it on the @MigrateFun site during that week. Tokens won't migrate on their own, so please make sure you complete the deposit manually.

Once the migration window closes on the 16th, you'll be able to claim your new $PNP tokens from the updated contract. 

If you miss the main window, there's a 90-day post-migration period where the old $PNP (on Believe) can still be exchanged for the new token with a 20% penalty. After those 90 days, old tokens stop being redeemable.  

NB: There is no dilution, the supply stays exactly the same  

Trading on the current CA continues until December 16th. After that, only the new PumpFun CA will be supported.  

We'll share the new contract address here as soon as it's live.

We are in contact with majority of exchanges and centralized DEXs who are responsive to migratefun's requests. There are some platform that are not willing to work our requests and thus may be subject to complications in the future. 

We are currently working through these channels and providing information to dozens of platform to protect users and thus takes some additional time to announce the official migration dates.

All is in motion and specific will be shared as soon as possible.

We’ve successfully completed the migration of PayAI tokens for DEX traders on OKX, in close collaboration with both @okxchinese and the @PayAINetwork.

This effort focused on enhancing support for Account Abstraction (AA) wallets. We provided standardized infrastructure to simplify the migration process, reducing costs and complexity for PayAI, while ensuring a secure and seamless experience for OKX users.

The result was a smooth and efficient migration that met the needs of both the project team and its broader user base.

Big thanks to the teams at OKX and PayAI for their support in helping us build the most robust migration infrastructure in the industry.
